title: 🏷️ RATING
data_structure:
```typescript
[
    {
        name: 'rating_value',
        datatype: 'number',
        mandatory: true,
        example: 93,
        scope: 'user',
        validation: ['mandatory', 'number'],
    },
    {
        name: 'scale_minimum',
        datatype: 'number',
        mandatory: true,
        example: 0,
        scope: 'user',
        validation: ['mandatory', 'number'],
    },
    {
        name: 'scale_maximum',
        datatype: 'number',
        mandatory: true,
        example: 100,
        scope: 'user',
        validation: ['mandatory', 'number'],
    },
    {
        name: 'scale_direction',
        datatype: 'string',
        mandatory: true,
        example: 'up',
        scope: 'user',
        validation: ['mandatory', 'string'],
    },
]
```
